description: Deepen iter3: max_depth 3 -> 4 on smoke geo_signal anchor. Tests interaction-depth bottleneck (vs iter2 capacity-count which tied). Single hyperparameter knob; n_estimators=100, lr=0.1, subsample=0.8 unchanged. If this also ties, capacity at this feature set is exhausted and iter4 should pivot to feature scope (cadastral TE or area_density_ratios).
